title: ferray-io: memmap returns raw MemmapArray — no ArrayView integration
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.load(file, mmap_mode='r') returns an ndarray backed by memory-mapped file — it's a normal array you can use with any NumPy function. ferray-io's MemmapArray has as_slice() and to_array() but isn't an ArrayView — you can't pass it to ferray functions that expect &Array<T, D> or ArrayView<T, D>. Add a .view() method that returns an ArrayView<T, IxDyn> backed by the mmap, or implement Deref to ArrayView.
